title: CHUD - Hypixel Skyblock
description: Mining utility mod for Hypixel Skyblock, with commission tracker, waypoints, mining tick rate display, and much more!
body:
# CHUD - For Hypixel Skyblock
A simple, _lightweight_ Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.5, 1.21.8, and **1.21.10,** focused around mining utilities on Hypixel Skyblock. With commission tracker, waypoints, mining tick rate display, and much more!
- https://discord.gg/u8b6cj2DED <- Discord server!

<details>
<summary>Why did you make this mod?</summary>

I had been using other mods to display these features, and i felt that they were just missing certain things. 

I love customization, and personalization. It's what makes something "yours", and the mods that i had found with these features, did not allow for much to be changed, which left much to be desired!

I also wanted something that was very light on performance, and had little to no impact on FPS, and that seems to be the case here.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Current features</summary>
  
- Shows active commissions from Dwarven Mines, Crystal Hollows, and Glacite Tunnels (with progress bars)
- Powder Tracker (toggle between /hr, /30mins, and /10mins)
- Integer display (36/250) or percentage (14%)
- Powder display for mithril, gemstone, and glacite (only shows if non zero)
- Pickaxe Ability display
- Pickobulus helper
- Stats display (displays all enabled in the stat widget sub-menu)
- Emissary Waypoints (toggle between always, or on completion)
- Custom waypoints (set a waypoint at your current location)
- Adjustable position (drag to move), scale, and text color
- Two display modes: show everywhere or only in mining areas (Commissions persist when leaving mining areas if enabled)
## and much, much more!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>

1. Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21.5, 1.21.8, or 1.21.10 **(1.21.10 recommended)**
2. Install Fabric API
3. Drop the mod .jar, and the Fabric API .jar into your `.minecraft/mods` folder
4. Launch the game!

</details>


<details>
<summary>VERY IMPORTANT! Required Hypixel setup!</summary>

The mod reads  data from the tab list. You need to enable specific widgets within Hypixel.

# Note: Some of these may be enabled by default, however, ensure that they are enabled to allow full mod functionality!

1. Join Hypixel SkyBlock, then join the desired island
2. Type `/widgets` or go to SkyBlock Menu → Settings → Personal → User Interface → Player List Info
3. Enable the "Commissions" widget
4. Enable the "Powder" widget
5. Enable the "Stats" widget, and right click it to select specific stats you'd like to display
6. Enable the "Pickaxe Ability" widget

# If you are using Skyblocker, you must disable "Fancy Tab"! As this mod requires the formatting from the default hypixel tab menu to read accurate data!


</details>


<details>
<summary>In-game usage!</summary>

Type `/chud` in-game to open the config screen.

All features are listed in the above section.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- Minecraft 1.21.5, 1.21.8, or 1.21.10 **(1.21.10 recommended)**
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- No compatibility issues! Plug and play with the mods you're currently enjoying. (Only conflicts with Skyblockers "Fancy TAB" module!)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Other notes</summary>
- If you would like to test new features, you may request beta versions in the discord, or wait for stable releases!

  
- Access will be abundandly given to those who are interested users, and those who can contribute meaningful testing related to the mod!


Be aware however, beta builds **may** have bugs, and features will not be smoothed out!


</details>
